Logs.Details: Queried source database for corroborating records on Bwalya Mwamba land titling investigation for print edition
Submitted mining sector investigation story for legal review before print publication in The Mast

Reports.Name: Q4 2025 Print Investigation Compliance Audit
Reports.Description: Comprehensive audit of editorial compliance across all active print investigations including source protection protocols, right-of-reply adherence, and ZAMEC code of conduct observance for News Diggers, The Mast, Daily Nation, Times of Zambia, and Zambia Daily Mail.

Reports.Name: FOIA Request Tracking Report - January 2026
Reports.Description: Monthly tracking report of all active FOIA requests filed by consortium newspapers. Includes response rates by ministry, statutory deadline compliance, and escalation recommendations for overdue requests.

Reports.Name: Source Protection Security Assessment 2026
Reports.Description: Annual assessment of source protection infrastructure across partner print newspapers. Covers encrypted communication channels, physical document storage, and digital hygiene practices for investigative teams.

Reports.Name: Cross-Border Investigation Legal Risk Report
Reports.Description: Legal risk analysis for print investigations spanning multiple jurisdictions including Zambia, DRC, and Tanzania. Covers defamation law variations, press freedom indices, and journalist protection frameworks.
